title: 3D-4X
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:3D-4X_EGD.jpg]] |name=3D-4X |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Genetech Corporation]] |line= |model=[[3D-4X administrative droid]] |class=[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=1.7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor=Gray |plating= |armament= |equipment=*3 storage compartments *Microphone/Stenographic recorder *3 direct cranial uplinks *1 [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptor]] *1 [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] *Auditory sensors *Communications scrambler/transmitter *Index finger laser pointer *Hidden storage compartment on right leg *Polished [[Chromite/Legends|Chromite]] shell |affiliation=[[IG-88's Droid Army]] }} {{Quote|Your afternoon tea, sir.''"
"''Ah, thank you.''"
"''Your afternoon reports, sir.''"
"''Ah, thank you.''"
"''Your death, sir.''"
"''Excuse me?|3D-4X and Hekis Durumm Perdo Kolokk Baldikarr Thun|{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}}} '''3D-4X''' was a silver-plated [[3D-4X administrative droid]]. ==Biography== 3D-4X served [[Hekis Durumm Perdo Kolokk Baldikarr Thun]] on [[Mechis III/Legends|Mechis III]]. He acted as the butler for the manufacturing administrator on the volcanic [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Sometime before [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], the escaped [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]] prototype [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] arrived at Mechis III after having left behind the smoldering ruins of the [[Holowan Laboratories/Legends|Holowan Laboratories]], and convinced 3D-4X to assassinate his own master. As of [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], long after the [[Droid Revolution]] had failed, he could be found serving the most recent owner of the droid manufacturing facilities on Mechis III, the [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Tyko Thul]]. {{Droid-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}} *''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *{{FactFile|120|ADM 1-2|3D-4X Administrative Droid}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:3D-4X administrative droids]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:Members of IG-88's Droid Army]]
